tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
standard tuning  
          
For [ch]Cadd9[/ch] & [ch]G[/ch] play
[tab]like a regular [ch]Cadd9[/ch] & [ch]G[/ch]
But put your pinkie [/tab]
finger on the 1st string
and your ring finger on the
2nd string 

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I hopped of the plane at LAX [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]          
with a dream and my cardigan[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
welcome to the land of fame excess, (Whoo)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
am I gonna fit in? [/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Jumped in the cab,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
Here I am for the first time [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Look to the right and I see the Hollywood sign [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
This is all so crazy [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
Everybody seems so famous[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
My tummys turnin and I'm feelin kinda home sick [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Too much pressure and I'm nervous,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
That's when the taxi man turned on the radio[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] (strum once) 
and a Jay Z song was on[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch] (strum once) 
and the Jay Z song was on [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] (strum once)
and the Jay Z song was on [/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] 
So I put my hands up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
They’re playing my song,[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch] 
And the butterflys fly away [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Noddin’ my head like yea [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Movin my hips like yea[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
I got my hands up,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
They’re playin my song[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch] 
I know im gonna be ok[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch] 
Yea, It's a party in the USA [/tab]
Yea, It's a party in the USA

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Get to the club in my taxi cab[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch] 
Everybody's lookin at me now[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
Like “whos that chick, thats rockin’ kicks?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch] 
She gotta be from out of town”[/tab]
 
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
So hard with my girls all around me [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Its definitely not a Nashville party[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
Cause’ all I see are stilletos[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch] 
I guess I never got the memo[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
My tummys turnin and I'm feelin kinda home sick [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Too much pressure and I'm nervous[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
That's when the D.J. dropped my favorite tune[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] (strum once) 
and a Britney song was on[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch] (strum once) 
and the Britney song was on[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] (strum once) 
and the Britney song was on [/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] 
So I put my hands up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
They’re playing my song,[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch] 
And the butterflys fly away [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Noddin’ my head like yea [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Movin my hips like yea[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
I got my hands up,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
They’re playin my song[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch] 
I know im gonna be ok[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch] 
Yea, It's a party in the USA [/tab]
Yea, It's a party in the USA
 
[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Feel like hoppin' on a flight (on a flight) [/tab]
Back to my hometown tonight (town tonight) 
Something stops me everytime (everytime) 
The DJ plays my song and I feel alright 

[Chorus] x2
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] 
So I put my hands up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
They’re playing my song,[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch] 
And the butterflys fly away [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Noddin’ my head like yea [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Movin my hips like yea[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
I got my hands up,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
They’re playin my song[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch] 
I know im gonna be ok[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch] 
Yea, It's a party in the USA [/tab]
Yea, It's a party in the USA
